title: Sanskrit Sahitya Utsav
description: Join us for a grand celebration of Sanskrit literature featuring recitations, dramas, and scholarly discussions by eminent speakers from across the country.
fullContent: The Sanskrit Sahitya Utsav is our flagship cultural event celebrating the rich heritage of Sanskrit literature. The event will span a full day and feature traditional Vedic chanting, dramatic interpretations of Kalidasa's works, and panel discussions by leading oriental scholars. Students will have the opportunity to showcase their linguistic proficiency through debates and poetry recitations. The festival aims to highlight the enduring relevance of Sanskrit and its timeless beauty in the modern world.

title: Annual Gurukula Retreat
description: A day-long retreat focused on traditional Gurukula practices, meditation, and understanding the core philosophies of Viswajanani Jillellamudi Amma.
fullContent: Our Annual Gurukula Retreat is designed to provide students and staff with a profound spiritual reset. Set against the serene backdrop of our campus grounds, participants will engage in early morning yoga, guided meditation sessions, and interactive workshops on the philosophy of universal love as taught by Viswajanani Jillellamudi Amma. The retreat fosters a deep sense of community, mutual respect, and holistic well-being, reflecting the core values of our institution.

title: National Conference on Oriental Studies
description: An academic conference bringing together researchers and students to discuss the relevance of ancient oriental studies in the modern digital era.
fullContent: The National Conference on Oriental Studies serves as a premier academic forum for researchers, educators, and students. This year's theme focuses on 'Integrating Ancient Wisdom with Digital Innovation.' Keynote speakers will explore the digitization of ancient manuscripts, computational linguistics applied to Sanskrit, and the role of oriental philosophy in modern ethics. The conference includes paper presentations, poster sessions, and networking opportunities for budding scholars.
